Empires & Puzzles Costumed Francine Review: 5-Star Legendary Nature Green Hero
Costumed Francine trades the hospital gown for a cocktail dress and brings an offer you can't refuse: an undispellable cleanse that keeps your team spotless. We review the Mafia Queen of Morlovia.
Costumed Francine: The Mobstress Who Scrubs You Clean (Permanently)
Costumed Francine: The Mobstress with the Cleanest Record
While the original Francine was a bit of a science experiment,

(The "Mobstress") is all business. Released a year later and significantly buffed since, this version transforms her from a niche cleanser into a powerhouse support hero. She swaps the Rogue class for
, puts on a stunning black dress, and gains an ability that is arguably one of the most valuable in the game: an
, which is the definitive way to play this hero.

Costumed Francine is a total vibe shift. She ditches the "Bride of Frankenstein" aesthetic for a 1920s flapper/mafia look. Holding a switchblade instead of scissors and radiating green electrical energy, she looks dangerous, elegant, and ready to cut a deal (or a throat). It's widely considered one of the best costume upgrades in terms of both art and utility.

With a base power of around 1140 (and significantly higher with Limit Breaks), she can stand toe-to-toe with many modern heroes. While she doesn't reach the absurd 1500+ base power of the absolute newest releases (like the Construct or Astral families), she is sturdy enough to survive in the current meta. Her health pool, in particular, gets a nice boost, allowing her to stay alive long enough to keep your team clean.

If you have Costumed Francine, level her immediately. She will be your primary cleanser for a very long time. She is versatile enough for raids, map stages, and titans.
She remains a key tool for your Blue Titan team. In Wars, she is an excellent counter-pick. While you might not LB2 her over a brand new 1500 power hero, she is definitely worth LB1 and full emblems.
"Her real draw is the undispellable 3 turn cleanse."
- A forum user who understood the assignment.
"Y'all are getting too hung up on her elemental defense down... It's just a cherry on top."
- Correctly identifying that her cleanse is the main course.
"Is the undispellable nature of the cleanse, at Fast, OP?"
- A valid question from 2021. The answer was "Yes, and it still is."

Costumed Francine is the kind of hero that ages like fine wine. Her damage numbers might fade, but "Undispellable Cleanse" is a phrase that never goes out of style. She is a specialized tool that does her job perfectly. Whether you're fighting a Blue Titan or a nasty DoT war defense, Francine is the professional you call to clean up the mess.
Review of Costumed Francine, the 'Mobstress' of the Morlovia family. We analyze her powerful undispellable cleanse, her role against Blue Titans, and why she's still a top-tier support hero.
